description: Declarative, code-EXECUTED onboarding registry for the real-signal EEG pipeline. Unlike configs/btc_icft/*_real.yaml (which are documentation-only and are not parsed by any code), this file is loaded at runtime by sciencer_d/btc_icft/datasets/onboarding_registry.py and drives the generic streaming processor (tools/stream_process_openneuro_dataset.py) and the generic Level-M/Level-T CLIs. Adding a new OpenNeuro EEG dataset that fits the 'simple task-to-state map, one window per fixed interval' shape requires ONLY a new entry here -- zero new Python files. ds001787 is deliberately NOT here: its dual-mode/behavioral-file shape has its own dedicated modules (see level_m/ds001787_windows_real.py).
label_policy: task_to_state maps must be authored by a human from confirmed real BIDS task labels (list them via tools.discover_openneuro_tasks). Semantic state labels are NEVER auto-inferred from task-name strings -- structural discovery is automated, the mapping is not (no_label_inference guardrail).
